name: arn-spark
description: Greenfield exploration for Codex. Discover product ideas, generate use cases, scaffold projects, and validate prototypes.

interface.shortDescription: Explore, shape, and prototype new product ideas.
interface.longDescription: Arness Spark guides greenfield work from raw idea through discovery, personas, use cases, architecture vision, naming, scaffolding, visual direction, and prototype validation. It preserves durable project artifacts under .arness.
defaultPrompt: Explore a product idea with Arness Spark.
Define use cases for this product.
Validate a prototype and extract features.
